info.name: Complaints Chat Channel
info.description: All endpoints for the complaint chat system — thread summaries, portal replies, BC replies, and status management.

variable.description: Register token from /api/auth/get-register-token (used by BC endpoints)

item.name: Thread Summaries
item.description: One entry per thread — used to populate the left-panel thread list in the chat UI.

request.description: Super admin gets ALL threads. Returns the first message per thread enriched with message_count, latest_activity, latest_status, latest_message.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 2,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "thread_id": "COMP-0001",
      "document_type": "Concern",
      "category": "Invoice Dispute",
      "partner_type": "Vendor",
      "sender_id": "VEND001",
      "sender_name": "John Doe",
      "message_text": "My invoice #INV-123 is incorrect.",
      "status": "Open",
      "message_count": "3",
      "latest_activity": "2026-05-24T10:30:00.000Z",
      "latest_status": "In Progress",
      "latest_message": "We are reviewing this now.",
      "bc_synced": true,
      "created_at": "2026-05-24T08:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Get Thread Summaries (Partner — by partner_no query)

request.description: For non-admin roles the backend auto-filters by the logged-in user's refNo. This query param is only honoured for admin callers.

item.name: Thread Messages
item.description: Read all messages within a single thread.

request.description: Returns all messages for a thread in ascending timestamp order (oldest first). Used to populate the chat window.

item.name: Create Complaint (New Thread)
item.description: Portal user creates a brand-new complaint thread. Backend generates the thread_id via NoSeries, saves to local DB, and auto-syncs to BC via the `messages` endpoint.

item.name: Create New Complaint — Portal (saves + syncs to BC `messages`)

body.raw:
{
  "documentType": "Concern",
  "category": "Invoice Dispute",
  "linkedDocType": "Invoice",
  "linkedDocNo": "INV-123",
  "messageText": "My invoice #INV-123 has an incorrect amount. Expected 500 AED but billed 750 AED.",
  "changeDetails": "Difference of 250 AED",
  "direction": "Portal-to-BC",
  "status": "Open"
}

request.description:
documentType: Message | Return Request | Amendment Request | Concern
category: General | Pricing Dispute | Quality Issue | Delivery Concern | Invoice Dispute | Return Request | Amendment Request | Credit Request
status: Sent | Delivered | Read | Open | In Progress | Resolved | Closed | Escalated

response.name: Success — BC synced
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Complaint created and synced to BC",
  "bcSynced": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "thread_id": "COMP-0001",
    "document_type": "Concern",
    "category": "Invoice Dispute",
    "linked_doc_type": "Invoice",
    "linked_doc_no": "INV-123",
    "sender_type": "Partner",
    "partner_type": "Vendor",
    "sender_id": "VEND001",
    "sender_name": "John Doe",
    "message_text": "My invoice #INV-123 has an incorrect amount.",
    "change_details": "Difference of 250 AED",
    "direction": "Portal-to-BC",
    "status": "Open",
    "bc_synced": true,
    "bc_error": null,
    "message_timestamp": "2026-05-24T08:00:00.000Z",
    "created_at": "2026-05-24T08:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

response.name: BC sync failed

item.name: Create New Complaint — From BC (BC-to-Portal, no sync back)

body.raw:
{
  "threadId": "COMP-BC-001",
  "documentType": "Message",
  "category": "General",
  "senderType": "Company",
  "partnerType": "Vendor",
  "senderId": "VEND001",
  "senderName": "BC System",
  "messageText": "Your complaint has been received and is being processed.",
  "direction": "BC-to-Portal",
  "status": "Delivered"
}

request.description: Called by Business Central to push a new complaint thread into the portal. Uses register token auth. Does NOT sync back to BC.

item.name: Reply to Thread
item.description: Send a reply inside an existing thread. Portal replies sync to BC via `commentMessageLines`. BC replies are stored locally only.

request.description:
Saves reply to local DB then POSTs to BC `commentMessageLines` endpoint.

- Partner users → sender_type = 'Partner'
- Admin/vendor_admin/customer_admin → sender_type = 'Company'

Only messageText is required. All other metadata (documentType, category, linkedDoc, partnerType) is inherited from the parent message in the thread.

response.name: Success — BC synced
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Reply sent and synced to BC",
  "bcSynced": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 4,
    "thread_id": "COMP-0001",
    "document_type": "Concern",
    "category": "Invoice Dispute",
    "sender_type": "Partner",
    "partner_type": "Vendor",
    "sender_id": "VEND001",
    "sender_name": "John Doe",
    "message_text": "Thank you for your response.",
    "direction": "Portal-to-BC",
    "status": "Sent",
    "bc_synced": true,
    "bc_error": null,
    "message_timestamp": "2026-05-24T10:30:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description:
Called by Business Central to post a reply into an existing thread.

Uses register token auth. Automatically sets:
- sender_type = 'Company'
- direction = 'BC-to-Portal'
- partnerType inherited from original thread

Does NOT sync back to BC (no loop).

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "BC reply received",
  "data": {
    "id": 5,
    "thread_id": "COMP-0001",
    "sender_type": "Company",
    "sender_name": "Accounts Team",
    "message_text": "We have corrected the invoice.",
    "direction": "BC-to-Portal",
    "status": "Resolved",
    "bc_synced": false
  }
}

item.name: Read Complaints
item.description: Various GET endpoints for querying individual complaints.

request.description: Returns all complaints (admin) or filtered by partnerNo/threadId query params.

item.name: Get All Complaints — Filter by partnerNo
Get All Complaints — Filter by threadId

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "thread_id": "COMP-0001",
    "document_type": "Concern",
    "category": "Invoice Dispute",
    "sender_type": "Partner",
    "partner_type": "Vendor",
    "sender_id": "VEND001",
    "sender_name": "John Doe",
    "message_text": "My invoice is incorrect.",
    "status": "Open",
    "bc_synced": true,
    "bc_error": null
  }
}

item.name: Status & Sync
item.description: Update status and manually re-trigger BC sync.

request.description: Allowed status values: Sent | Delivered | Read | Open | In Progress | Resolved | Closed | Escalated

response.name: Invalid Status

request.description: Manually re-syncs a complaint to BC `messages` endpoint. Useful when the original auto-sync failed.

response.name: Success
BC Sync Failed

request.description: Hard-deletes a single complaint row. Admin only.
